series_metadata.series_description: Children's Trust Fund Board records regarding child abuse /neglect prevention policy and funding under OCTF. Files include board members appointment's documentation by laws and amendments meeting agendas, hand-outs, confidential financial disclosure information and minutes. OCTF strategic plan, fiscal reports and related correspondence. The board meets 4 times per year.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office ; Electronic: in office
